name: Oura Ring MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server for Oura Ring health wearable. Connects to Oura Ring cloud API to enable AI agents to access wellness data — sleep scores, HRV, readiness, activity, and biometric trends. Enables AI health assistants and personal analytics agents to incorporate Oura biometric data into wellness coaching and analysis workflows.
use_cases: Personal health AI assistants accessing Oura sleep and readiness data
Wellness coaching agents incorporating biometric trends for personalized recommendations
Analyzing Oura Ring data for health pattern detection from personal analytics agents
Integrating wearable biometrics into daily planning and optimization agents
not_for: Medical diagnosis or clinical applications (consumer wellness device, not medical grade)
Real-time biometric streaming (Oura API provides daily/summary data, not continuous streams)
best_when: A personal health or wellness AI agent needs access to Oura Ring biometric data — sleep quality, HRV, readiness scores — to provide personalized health insights and recommendations.
avoid_when: You need continuous real-time biometric data or medical-grade precision. Oura Ring is a consumer wellness device — not FDA-cleared for clinical decision making.

auth.notes: Oura Personal Access Token or OAuth2 required. Register Oura developer app at cloud.ouraring.com. Scopes for specific data types (sleep, activity, readiness).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free API access for personal use with Oura Ring hardware
pricing.paid_tiers: Oura membership fee for Oura Cloud subscription features
pricing.notes: API access is free with Oura Ring. Oura membership subscription required for full cloud features. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Oura API rate limits apply; adequate for personal use

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Health and biometric data is highly sensitive — handle with appropriate data governance
Oura API v2 access token management needed for long-running agents — implement token refresh
Sleep/health data should not be logged or stored beyond what's necessary for the agent's purpose
Community server (eliu243) — verify against current Oura API v2 for compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Health/biometric data is extremely sensitive. OAuth2 Oura auth. HTTPS. Health data subject to GDPR/CCPA. Implement strict data minimization and retention policies.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY: Health biometric data. OAuth2 auth. GDPR/CCPA compliance. Data minimization critical. Never log sleep/health data beyond immediate need.
